abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: "It Didn't Like That Much..."
abilities.text: When a Shielded token is removed from this model, enemies within (melee)1" gain an Injured token.

abilities.name: Rage Machine
abilities.text: Enemy models within 3" with an Analyzed token suffer a (-) to Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Snort Steam
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)3" of the target.

triggers.name: Maddened Stomp
triggers.text: Remove all markers within (aura)2" of the target. When resolving, deal +1 damage for each marker removed this way (to a maximum of +2).

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Belly Full o' Coals
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Enemy models within (aura)1" of this model must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or gain a Burning token.
